mapper.insert: INSERT INTO email_verify_code (user_id, email, email_type, code_hash, scene, expire_at, verified_at, try_count, send_ip, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{email}, #{emailType}, #{codeHash}, #{scene}, #{expireAt}, #{verifiedAt}, #{tryCount}, #{sendIp}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE email_verify_code SET try_count = try_count + 1, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE email_verify_code SET status = 'VERIFIED', verified_at = #{verifiedAt}, update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(3) WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'PENDING'
